title: Store and public playtest material draft
summary: Draft non-final M7 store and public playtest materials only after onboarding, balance, cultural review, Windows and Web boundaries are verified.
acceptance: Drafts non-final store/playtest materials: description, key claims, screenshot needs, trailer or GIF shot list, scope statement and known limits
Incorporates cultural review, onboarding, early-game balance, Web demo-only and Windows controlled-test boundaries
Marks all store-facing copy as draft and not approved for submission or publication
Does not submit store pages, upload public release assets, sign builds, enable telemetry or make final legal/privacy/store claims
Creates downstream-citable material package for known issues, tester protocol and M7 readiness review

history.details: Created by WM-0098 M7 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.
Drafted non-final M7 store/playtest material package with descriptions, key claims, screenshot needs, shot list, scope limits and owner gates; required checks pass.

verified: No blocking findings; draft package satisfies WM-0106 acceptance, preserves Web demo-only and Windows controlled-test boundaries, keeps all material non-final/not approved for publication, and focused checks passed.
Verified WM-0106 integrated after validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality passed.

objective: Prepare non-final store and playtest material drafts that truthfully reflect verified M7 boundaries.
forbiddenPaths: public release upload or public Web launch
signing credentials, installer, updater or Steam/store package
final legal privacy store or save-compatibility claims
telemetry accounts paid services crash upload or public feedback system
M8 task creation, promotion, claim, implementation or review
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: draft public copy can look like final store approval; every artifact must be labeled draft/non-final.
Risk: material claims can contradict Web demo-only or Windows controlled-test verdicts; cite WM-0103/WM-0104.
File ownership is limited to design/roadmap draft material documents and WM-0106 reports.
ownerGate: Block on store submission, public release, public Web launch or signed build distribution
Block on final legal/privacy/store/save-compatibility claims without owner approval
Block if cultural review, Web scope or Windows scope dependencies are not verified
m0M6RegressionCoverage: No runtime, save, benchmark or platform verdict changes
Public-facing draft claims must cite verified M0-M6/M7 evidence only
M6 Web and Windows verdicts remain unchanged
reviewRouting: gameplay-designer completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies all dependency evidence is reflected and no submission/release action occurred.
rollbackModel: Revert draft material docs and WM-0106 reports; downstream known-issues and protocol tasks remain blocked until replacement material exists.

sparkEligibility.reason: Public-facing material claims require product, cultural and platform judgment and are owner-gated.

review.summary: No blocking findings; draft package satisfies WM-0106 acceptance, preserves Web demo-only and Windows controlled-test boundaries, keeps all material non-final/not approved for publication, and focused checks passed.

integration.summary: Verified WM-0106 integrated after validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality passed.
